note: Advisory sandbox build. DX-5 is a read-only wording-debt rollup over the language_gate_review sidecars; its proof is a data-driven tally checked against an independent hand-count on two known sidecars, red-capable by a minimal one-item mutation that shifts the tally by exactly one. Never a bare governance PASS.
title: Wording-debt rollup over the 92 language_gate_review sidecars (ranked HTML table)

subject.note: tallies each sidecar's language_gate review reasons into 7 canonical buckets (AGENT_REVIEW, UNDEFINED_TERM, ALIAS_RETIRED, SYNONYM_DRIFT, PLAIN_ENGLISH, REGEX_REWRITE, LATENT_UNDEFINED_TERM) + a per-file decision, then renders a ranked HTML table. Sources read-only.

what_it_proves: the glob finds the full sidecar corpus (92) and tallies 229 wording-debt items into 7 canonical reason buckets with a per-file decision
the ranked table is non-increasing in wording-debt (most debt first); rank monotonic; corpus total == sum of row totals

POSITIVE — the tally matches an INDEPENDENT hand-count on two known real sidecars (brain-as-a-service.md -> 8x UNDEFINED_TERM, decision REVIEW; BIG_PICTURE_RELATION_MAP.md -> 1x AGENT_REVIEW), and every other bucket is exactly zero on those files

NEGATIVE / red-capable — a MINIMAL MUTATION of a parsed sidecar (append one dictionary_warning, drop one, or retype one) shifts the tally by exactly one; the same equality that holds on the real dict FAILs on the mutant — the tally discriminates real vs mutated input, not green-by-construction
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner

empty-sink discipline: zero-debt sidecars render as an explicit CLEAN badge and sidecars missing all debt keys render as UNPOPULATED — never a bare 0 that reads all-clear; counts are REAL (read from disk), not synthetic
no autonomy / guaranteed-outcome claim; theme-aware, brand-neutral, self-contained (inline CSS/JS)
chess_patches_applied: positive fixture is a hand-count done independently of the tally code, on the REAL on-disk sidecars (not an authored strawman)
negative fixture is a single-item mutation of that same real dict; the tally assertion is never relaxed to pass
tally_sidecar is a pure function of the parsed JSON (no I/O), so the test drives it with real and mutated dicts directly
verdict vocab CHECK_OK / CHECK_REJECTED, origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; never a bare governance PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (sidecars + library read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/DX-5, generator writes no receipt into any tracked dir)
Lock 10 deliverable (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, no autonomy/outcome claim, CLEAN/UNPOPULATED badges not bare 0)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; HOME redirected to temp)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands; other lanes' untracked files not read/staged/depended on

results.mutated_tally: append/drop/retype one warning -> tally shifts by exactly one (discriminates)

exit_gate_B4: DX-5 done — wording-debt rollup globs the 92 language_gate_review sidecars, tallies review reasons/decision per file, ranks a self-contained HTML table to out/, matches an independent hand-count, and is red-capable via a minimal mutated tally.
next_action: wire the same rollup to a freshness check (sidecar mtime vs reviewed doc mtime) to flag STALE sidecars, and consider a DX sibling that diffs two rollups over time to show wording-debt burndown.
